events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess fall protection with frayed/burned webbing. Work rough-complete. Need decide fail because defective/non-compliant. Risk high/critical? Frayed/burned webbing on fall protection equipment is critical hazard, could fail arrest. Decision fail. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Confidence 1.0. Findings: webbing damaged, compromised strength. Actions: remove from service, replace, inspect. Rationale. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140. Need valid JSON only, no prose. Ensure fields present.

    "Damaged fall protection component is installed and could be used before close-out, creating a fall-arrest failure hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the damaged fall protection equipment from service and tag it out.",
    "Replace the frayed/burned webbing or entire assembly with compliant, inspected equipment.",
    "Inspect all related fall protection components before returning to service.",

  ],
  "rationale": "Frayed and burned webbing on fall protection equipment is a defective, non-compliant condition that compromises the equipment's ability to arrest a fall. OSHA requires personal fall protection systems and components to be inspected and removed from service when damaged or defective. Because the damaged component is installed at a rough-complete stage, it presents a critical fall hazard and must be failed.",

    "OSHA 1926 Subpart M - Fall Protection",

  ]
